name: Environment
note: Three-state field: (a) active=false → axis default applies (Preserve for MOD-D, Neutral for MOD-F), (b) active=true, value='Preserve'|'Neutral'|'Custom' → user explicit choice wins over axis default. Only user_explicit overrides the axis default.

custom_text.description: Free text describing the custom environment (only used when value='Custom')
